seams: H-M0AP-MEASURE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, shown ONLY blind per-stratum renderings (passage + marked token + gloss-rendered proposed sense(s); no urns, no stratum labels, no mention of a mapping system), completes the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage, yielding proxy P/R under the pinned published estimator. PASS means exactly 'a valid blind-LLM proxy measurement exists' — never a mapper-quality endorsement (the M0a pre-registration is a measurement with no kill bar, and the proxy cannot invent one)

H-M0AP-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): high 'correct' rates could be gloss-endorsement leniency rather than sense judgment; the deranged-gloss probe (another target's gloss on the same token/context; correct answer 'incorrect' by construction) bounds the crude form — false-endorsement >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome

H-M0AP-AGENT-DELTA (disclosed diagnostic, never verdict-bearing): per-stratum raw agreement between the blind proxy labels and the 2026-07-07 non-blind project-contexted agent labels; divergence measures blindness + judge-family effects JOINTLY and attributes nothing — attribution belongs to the human pass on the same items
summary: Experiment m0a-llmproxy: verdict PASS. Hypotheses: H-M0AP-MEASURE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, shown ONLY blind per-stratum renderings (passage + marked token + gloss-rendered proposed sense(s); no urns, no stratum labels, no mention of a mapping system), completes the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage, yielding proxy P/R under the pinned published estimator. PASS means exactly 'a valid blind-LLM proxy measurement exists' — never a mapper-quality endorsement (the M0a pre-registration is a measurement with no kill bar, and the proxy cannot invent one), H-M0AP-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): high 'correct' rates could be gloss-endorsement leniency rather than sense judgment; the deranged-gloss probe (another target's gloss on the same token/context; correct answer 'incorrect' by construction) bounds the crude form — false-endorsement >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome, H-M0AP-AGENT-DELTA (disclosed diagnostic, never verdict-bearing): per-stratum raw agreement between the blind proxy labels and the 2026-07-07 non-blind project-contexted agent labels; divergence measures blindness + judge-family effects JOINTLY and attributes nothing — attribution belongs to the human pass on the same items. Endpoints: primary(primary)=True; sec-precision(secondary)=0.7143303331013097; sec-recall(secondary)=0.8419117806573153; sec-probe-gate(secondary)=True; sec-agent-delta(secondary)={'abstain': 0.9, 'concept': 0.81, 'none': 1.0, 'prime': 0.8}; sec-retest(secondary)=0.9666666666666667. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): m0a-llmproxy has NO hypothesis kill by design: the M0a pre-registration (docs/poc-design.md Phase M) is a MEASUREMENT with no pass/fail bar, and a stand-in may not invent one — a proxy record that manufactured a mapper-quality gate would be enveloping a decision the human pass was never asked to make. The only kill-shaped rule is instrument validity (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL): preflight failure; n_labelled < 285/300 or any stratum floor missed (>= 90 per 100-item stratum, >= 45 per 50-item stratum); retest raw agreement < 0.80; deranged-gloss probe false-endorsement >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 36/40 (a judge endorsing wrong glosses at >= 0.30 is answering from leniency/style, and its 'correct' labels cannot be read as sense judgments — the channel that would fabricate high proxy precision). Programme reading (non-verdict, envelope clause 6): materially LOW proxy precision or a nonzero none-stratum miss rate is an early warning on the mapper line and warrants escalation before any downstream reuse of mapper outputs. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE PRE-REGISTERED HUMAN PASS: the M0a human-annotation role is filled by a pinned LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low) because the human annotator is unavailable at run time; the human pass over mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl (300 items, sha256 038604a8d7d0fa160209805374b5c89dd5a044c552d1e0dafe0d2bd028575a2c) remains the sole gold standard and the ONLY thing that discharges the poc-design.md M0a pre-registration ('precision/recall against human annotation'). The proxy P/R ARE one LLM's blind word-sense judgments under gloss rendering — NOT human annotation. They REPLACE the 2026-07-07 agent-judged provisionals (strict P 0.82 / strict R 0.8865, produced by a NON-BLIND, project-contexted, Claude-family agent) as the programme's provisional numbers, upgrading exactly two properties — blindness (kernel-instance-naive context control) and author-family independence (cross-vendor judge) — and upgrading NOTHING else: the judge species is still LLM, and every citation of these numbers must carry the WEAK-PROXY label pending the human pass. Binding weakenings: (1) SINGLE CROSS-VENDOR JUDGE — the estimand is 'GPT-5.x-family blind sense judgment of the mapper's outputs'; family-level leniency or severity moves P/R independent of real mapper quality; the retest floor is stability only. (2) WSD-COMPETENCE GAP — LLM sense judgments approximate human annotation with unproven offsets, concentrated exactly where the agent pass located the error mass (light-verb, phrasal, idiomatic, auxiliary uses); direction unproven (ASM-0543 measures the joint delta, the human pass attributes it). (3) DESIGN LIMITS CARRY OVER UNCHANGED — TinyStories favourable-case domain (pre-registered as such, verbatim), stratum-population reweighting stipulated from the published report (ASM-0542), and the none-stratum thinness (50 items over 2,958,417 tokens = 78% of token mass; recall_lower_bound95 via Clopper-Pearson stands): the proxy fixes NONE of these. (4) LICENSE OF A PASS — PASS means exactly: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM completed the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage with a demonstrated working deranged-gloss control'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT discharge the M0a pre-registration, is NOT a mapper-quality endorsement, does NOT validate the mapper for any downstream experiment whose frozen record names human annotation, and does NOT extend to other corpora, other domains, natural-user distributions, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (5) ASYMMETRIC READING — the named channels (gloss-endorsement leniency, tradition familiarity ASM-0552) plausibly push 'correct' judgments UP, so LOW proxy precision or a nonzero none-miss rate is the more informative outcome (early warning on the mapper line, escalate before downstream reuse); high proxy P/R licenses only continued investment (human annotator sourcing, mapper-line engineering) and never upgrades any claim. (6) Item bytes and the published estimator are byte-identical to the pending human pass's; per-item proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human pass yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement AND settles the proxy-vs-agent attribution (ASM-0553, ASM-0543); nothing else carries over.
title: Registry verdict: m0a-llmproxy
